code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    println("")
    Ok(())
  else
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    mut prev: Option<Int> = None
    while i < parts.len()
      let part_opt = parts.get(i)
      let part = match part_opt
      when Some(p)
        p
      when None
        ""
      end
      let n_opt = string.parse_int(part)
      let n = match n_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      let should_add = match prev
      when Some(p)
        not (p == n)
      when None
        true
      end
      if should_add
        result = list.push(result, n)
        prev = Some(n)
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    while j < result.len()
      let val_opt = result.get(j)
      let val = match val_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if j == 0
        out = "#{val}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{val}"
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
    Ok(())
  end
end
